name: redesign-narrative-layout
title: redesign frontend single-column narrative layout
description: Restructure landing + tool pages into a single-column narrative layout (Linear/Vercel style): minimal hero, numbered rows over cards, hairline dividers, scroll fade/stagger. Keep editorial brand tokens (color, font, radius). Cover IndexPage, ToolsPage, MainLayout header, three tool pages' outer shell, and a global page-transition animation.
creator: akko
